item.title: Does Bayesian A/B testing fix peeking?
item.description: "Our platform is Bayesian, so checking early is fine." A simulation of 20,000 tests between two identical pages shows a default flat prior calls a fake winner 31.7% of the time after fifty peeks.

item.title: 7 questions to ask before you believe an A/B test
item.description: The deck says +23%. Seven questions that separate real wins from lucky ones, with what good and bad answers sound like.

item.title: How much traffic do you need to A/B test an online store?
item.description: At 10,000 visitors a month, detecting a 10% lift takes 56 weeks. The arithmetic to run before any test, and what actually works at small-store traffic.
